name: foundation-registry
tagline: The decisions behind the work, written down and easy to find later.
sellMe: Decisions scatter across chat and one-off docs, and the reasoning is gone six months later. This keeps them as plain Markdown records, each owned by a team and linked in order from requirement to release, so the why is always there. It's a record, not a running app.

products.name: registry
products.description: The records themselves, checked for consistency and published as a browsable index.

products.name: trp
products.description: A protocol for working a ticket through to a decision, with a check that the result holds up.
